docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AYON BRAVO, JOSE ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $50.00 REMARKS: PER EMPLOYEE, THEY CANNOT CONFIRM OR DENY IF RESPONDENT WORKS AT LOCATION PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AYON BRAVO, JOSE ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-14-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. (VERONICA ROASALES) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ANTONIO AYON BRAVO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:UNABLE TO GAIN ENTRY ON THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AYON BRAVO, JOSE ANTONIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES
